regulatory_context.value: CSRD wave-two/wave-three reporting is postponed by two years, and VSME is intended to ease SME value-chain requests.

training_support_route.value: Luxembourg company-training co-funding exists at 15%, with a 35% wage-cost uplift for qualifying participants.

target_audience_summary.value: SMEs facing value-chain sustainability requests, plus CSR, compliance, and finance staff.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: This is a useful synthesis, but it is still partly inferential and should not be treated as default dashboard truth.

commercial_pricing_context.value: Competitor public prices range from 300 EUR to 1,750 EUR, but this does not establish a safe price for A10.
commercial_pricing_context.omission_reason: Price anchoring is useful context, but it remains too inferential to ship as truth.

product_delivery_model.omission_reason: Standalone course vs course-plus-template vs partner-led advisory remains a product-design choice, not a public fact.

product_accreditation_route.omission_reason: No public evidence was found that A10 itself has a dedicated certification or accreditation route.
